titleEn: Poultry WorldJun 12VideoPoultry Talks: Maximising automation in the poultry industry
titleZh: 家禽业自动化最大化：WingScan羽毛性别识别技术引领变革
summaryZh: 本文报道了家禽业在养殖场、加工厂和孵化场中日益依赖自动化的趋势，并以Targan公司开发的WingScan自动羽毛性别识别机为例，展示了自动化带来的高产出、高精度和高效流程。文章还介绍了Poultry Talks节目中关于如何通过安装、培训、优化和长期性能跟踪来最大化自动化效益的讨论，强调防止停机是关键。
translationZh:
家禽业在养殖场、加工厂和孵化场中日益依赖自动化。其好处显而易见：更高的产出、更高的精度和更高效的流程。一个很好的例子是Targan公司开发的WingScan自动羽毛性别识别机，该设备已安装在全球各地的孵化场中。

在本期Poultry Talks节目中，我们探讨了充分发挥自动化效益所需的条件，因为必须不惜一切代价防止停机。Misset的编辑总监Fabian Brockötter与Targan的客户成功经理Jason Fryar和Ricardo Martin一起，讨论了他们的团队如何将先进技术转化为日常成果——从安装和培训到优化、故障排除和长期性能跟踪。

观看上一期Poultry Talks节目，该节目聚焦大豆，探讨其作为饲料原料的作用，并分析了大豆禁令及其对巴西的意义。
featuredReason: 该新闻聚焦家禽业自动化，特别是WingScan羽毛性别识别技术，与智慧畜牧中AI和自动化应用高度相关，且内容包含实践案例和专家讨论，对行业从业者具有参考价值。
contentFull:
Poultry Talks: Maximising automation in the poultry industry

The poultry industry is increasingly reliant on automation on farms, in processing facilities and in hatcheries. The benefits are clear: higher output, greater accuracy and more efficient processes. A good example is the WingScan automated feather-sexing machine developed by Targan, which has been installed in hatcheries around the world. 

Fabian BrockötterEditor in Chief, Poultry World

Jun 12

Video

In this episode of Poultry Talks, we examine the conditions needed to get the most out of automation, as downtime must be prevented at all costs. Editorial director at Misset, Fabian Brockötter, is joined by Targan customer success managers Jason Fryar and Ricardo Martin to discuss how their teams turn advanced technology into day-to-day results — from installation and training to optimisation, troubleshooting and long-term performance tracking.

Watch the previous episode of Poultry Talks, which focussed on soy, exploring its role as a feed ingredient and examining the Soy Moratorium, what it is and what it means for Brazil.
author: Fabian Brockötter
